name: mcp
description: MCP integration — ships claude_desktop_config.json snippet + memory/

files.content:
# MCP setup for this project

## 1. Install MemKraft with MCP extras
```bash
pip install 'memkraft[mcp]'
```

## 2. Verify the server runs
```bash
memkraft mcp doctor
memkraft mcp test
```

## 3. Wire into Claude Desktop
Merge the contents of `claude_desktop_config.snippet.json` into:
- macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json`
- Windows: `%APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json`

Replace `/ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/YOUR/memory` with the absolute path to this project's `memory/` directory.

## 4. Restart Claude Desktop

The `memkraft` server should now appear in the tools panel.

## Tools exposed
- `remember(name, info, source)` — append to entity timeline
- `search(query, fuzzy)` — hybrid search
- `recall(name)` — read entity page
- `link(source, target)` — add wiki link

See `docs/mcp-setup.md` in the MemKraft repo for full troubleshooting.
